text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This event is famed as an electrifying sprint. A
1,200-meter G1 race, it's the highlight of spring
at Chukyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And what's more...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The person I most admire is entering.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Dignified, elegant, noble, and beautiful—she's
the closest in the entire world to being like
Princess Fighter.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.
choice_data_list: You still can't decide how to carry yourself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.
choice_data_list:
Well, I'm certain your ideal lies in wait just
ahead.

Well, I'm certain your ideal lies in wait just
ahead.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right.
choice_data_list: Get out there and discover it for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You know that you're not suited for running in
sprints.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Answer this, Kawakami. Did you enter this race
just to emulate me?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King... I...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll take that silence as your answer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If running in this race is not something you can do
proudly, then withdraw at once.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The G1 races are fit only for Umamusume who
have pride in themselves.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Can you say you feel proud in this very moment?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going on ahead.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: A princess doesn't back down...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There are still... There are still things I can learn
from you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Fear not, for I am here—the first-rate
Umamusume, King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's King! Has she come to claim the king's
throne again this year?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Isn't she past her time already? How long is she
gonna keep trying to stay relevant?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Those who face challenges and those who walk
their own path will not always be met with praise
and admiration. To grasp victory is to shatter
another's dream.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: My name is King Halo, and this is the path I tread!
